---
title: "table_1"
author: "Arnaud"
date: "2026-07-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown
```{r}
library(table1)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(rmarkdown)

```
  # Dataset
```{r }
#setwd("C:/Disk F/4.Oxford Modelling for Global Health/Job applications/361.Interview LSTMH Pharma First_1/Work plan/OS analysis/")
# data<- read_csv(
# "dataset_patients_combined (1).csv",
#show_col_types = FALSE)

library("tidyverse")

df_input <- read_csv(
  here::here("output", "dataset_patients_combined.csv.gz"),
  col_types = cols(patient_id = col_integer(), age = col_double())
)
data_1 <-data.frame(df_input)
 data2<-data_1 %>%
  mutate(
    Period = case_when(
      .data$start_date < as.Date("2024-02-01") ~ "Pre-PF",
      TRUE ~ "Post-PF"
    )
  )
```
 #Table 1 in html
```{r}
table1(
  ~ age + sex + ethnicity + region |
    imd,
  data = data2
)

rmarkdown::render(
  input = "analysis/table_1.Rmd",
  output_file = "table_1.html",
  output_dir = "output"
)
```
